entries.name: aimind-unified-search
entries.description: Unified cross-source search — decomposes a query, fans out in parallel to Gmail, Calendar, Obsidian vault, semantic memory, and Drive, then synthesizes a single answer with source attribution.

entries.name: aimind-productivity-update
entries.description: Weekly retrospective gap-finder — scans the last 7 days of email, calendar, Telegram archives, and Obsidian dailies to surface missed todos, stale tasks, unresolved threads, and memory candidates. Complements the forward-looking morning briefing.

entries.name: aimind-spec-writing
entries.description: Structured spec/PRD/brainstorm authoring. Takes a vague idea, feature name, or problem statement and produces a scannable PRD with problem, goals, non-goals, user stories, P0/P1/P2 requirements, success metrics, open questions, and timeline considerations. Also supports brainstorm-partner mode.

entries.name: velph-sales
entries.description: Pre-sales workflow for Velph client work — account research, call prep, outreach drafting, and competitive intelligence. Uses web search, Gmail, calendar, and Obsidian as the data layer (no CRM, no enrichment SaaS). Complements aimind-offer for the proposal stage.
